fetch.title: Fetch {resource} For The Stores
fetch.description: The quartermasters in {settlement_name} need more {resource}. Bring in a fresh haul before the shelves go empty.

kill.title: Cull The {target}
kill.description: Predators near {settlement_name} are threatening traffic and livestock. Track down the {target} pack and break their hold.

escort.title: Escort A Caravan To {destination}
escort.description: A lightly guarded caravan is leaving {settlement_name}. Walk it safely toward {destination} and keep the road clear.

deliver.title: Deliver Emergency {resource}
deliver.description: {settlement_name} needs a fast delivery of {resource}. Make sure it reaches the right hands intact.

investigate.title: Investigate The {site}
investigate.description: Strange reports from the {site} are spreading through {settlement_name}. Go see what is really out there and report back.

defend.title: Defend Against {target}
defend.description: Scouts warn that {target} may strike soon. Reinforce {settlement_name} and hold the line if the threat arrives.
